guidebook.entry.welcome_overview.title: VerseWorks In One Page
guidebook.entry.welcome_overview.body.1: VerseWorks lets you create custom dimensions by combining verses in rituals. The mod's core loop is: collect verses, configure a cauldron ritual, create a Hyper Book, then travel into a world shaped by the rules you chose.
guidebook.entry.welcome_overview.body.2: Use the codex to learn the path from finding verses to shaping strange new worlds of your own.
guidebook.entry.welcome_home.title: What Do You Want To Learn?
guidebook.entry.welcome_home.body.1: Use the links below to jump directly into the parts of VerseWorks most players need first.
guidebook.entry.getting_started_material: The early VerseWorks journey is built around the verses you uncover, along with Hyper Dust, the Dimensional Analyzer, and your first Mystic Crystals. Keep a source of books, paper, cauldrons, and water nearby as well.
Verses are found in the world, most often tucked inside Mystic Crystals or hidden away in ruined places. Blank Verses are only used when you want to copy a verse you have already found.
guidebook.entry.getting_started_keep.bod: A reliable ritual area should include: a lit cauldron full of water, spare Blank Verses, extra Hyper Dust, a signed book for naming linked dimensions, and a safe lectern area for travel.
guidebook.entry.verses_families.title: Verse Families
guidebook.entry.verses_families.body.1: Verse families include biome verses, environment verses, structure verses, shape verses, pool verses, surface verses, and crystal verses. Some verses add a behavior while anti-verses disable one.
guidebook.entry.verses_families.body.2: If two verses overlap, the ritual draws on the final set that remains and weaves them into one realm. Combinations matter more than order.
guidebook.entry.verses_shapes.title: Shape And Pool Verses
guidebook.entry.verses_shapes.body.1: Shape verses add spheres or cubes of blocks into generated chunks. Pool verses carve rare pools from source fluids that can include supported modded fluids when those fluids expose a placeable source block.
guidebook.entry.rituals_cauldron.title: Bubbling Cauldron Setup
guidebook.entry.rituals_cauldron.body.1: Most VerseWorks rituals begin at a water cauldron heated from below. If the cauldron is not full and actively heated, the ritual will not advance.
guidebook.entry.rituals_cauldron.body.2: Keep the area clear so dropped items land in the cauldron cleanly. If the ingredient signature changes or invalid items remain too long, the ritual can reset or spit items back out.
guidebook.entry.rituals_dimension.title: Creating A Realm
guidebook.entry.rituals_dimension.body.1: To shape a new realm, cast a named signed book into the bubbling cauldron together with your chosen non-blank verses and 32 Hyper Dust. If the verses agree, the ritual binds them into a linked Hyper Book that can open the road to that world.
guidebook.entry.rituals_unlinked.title: Making An Unlinked Hyperbook
guidebook.entry.rituals_unlinked.body.1: An unlinked Hyperbook is born from a simpler rite. Feed 32 Hyper Dust and a single piece of paper into the bubbling cauldron, and the book that rises back out will wait to be awakened somewhere of your choosing.
guidebook.entry.rituals_duplicate.title: Verse Duplication
guidebook.entry.rituals_duplicate.body.1: To duplicate a verse, combine a verse with Hyper Dust, a Blank Verse, and glow ink at a valid bubbling cauldron. The duplication flow consumes the inputs and launches the copied verse back out of the ritual.
guidebook.entry.rituals_hyperbook.title: Linked Hyperbook Ritual
guidebook.entry.rituals_hyperbook.body.1: A linked Hyper Book ritual uses a signed written book for a realm's name, Hyper Dust for power, and the chosen verses to bind the path. When the ritual succeeds, the cauldron spits out a linked Hyper Book ready to anchor that destination.
guidebook.entry.hyperbooks_linked.title: Linked And Unlinked Hyperbooks
guidebook.entry.hyperbooks_linked.body.1: An unlinked Hyperbook binds itself to the place where it is awakened. A linked Hyper Book already knows the realm it belongs to and is meant to be placed on a lectern for travel.
guidebook.entry.hyperbooks_linked.body.2: When a linked book rests on a lectern, it can tunnel through space and time to reopen the road to that destination again and again.
guidebook.entry.hyperbooks_lectern.title: Lectern Travel
Place a linked Hyper Book on a lectern, then interact with it to begin travel. The book will pull you through a fold in space-time and carry you toward the realm it was bound to.
guidebook.entry.dimensions_overview.body: VerseWorks dimensions can differ wildly in terrain, structures, surfaces, pools, crystal growths, gravity, time, weather, and atmosphere. Every journey can feel like stepping into a different dream, ruin, or impossible horizon.
guidebook.entry.stability_warp.title: Warp And Stability
guidebook.entry.stability_warp.body.1: Warp is a corrupting force that twists realms and eats away at what stands before it. Warp blocks and vines are not safe growths to cultivate. They spread ruin, consume the world around them, and mark places where danger is already taking hold.
guidebook.entry.tools_analyzer.title: Dimensional Analyzer
guidebook.entry.tools_analyzer.body.1: The Dimensional Analyzer helps you sense warp, read the danger around a place, and avoid stepping blindly into unstable ground. Keep it close whenever you travel somewhere strange.
guidebook.entry.troubleshooting_common.b: If a ritual did nothing, verify the cauldron is full, heated, and using valid ingredients. If a linked book does not travel correctly, check whether the destination is still activating or whether the dimension collapsed.
If a feature still looks missing, test in brand new chunks and confirm the dimension actually includes the required verse or command option.
guidebook.note.ritual_layout.dimension_n: Use a signed book with the realm's name
guidebook.note.ritual_layout.dimension_p: Feed it 32 Hyper Dust and your chosen verses
guidebook.note.ritual_layout.unlinked_fo: Offer one sheet of paper to form the blank path
guidebook.note.ritual_layout.verses: Around it: verses, dust, and book items
guidebook.note.ritual_layout.lectern: Finish at a lectern for repeat travel
